About Alex Miller

  1. Home
  2. About
Licensed Auctioneer & REALTOR®

Meet Alex Miller

Alex Miller grew up in central Kansas, around farms, feedlots, and the kind of land that doesn’t get any attention unless someone’s buying or selling it. He went into real estate because he understood the ground, and he got into auctioneering because he saw how often traditional listings failed landowners who deserved better.

He’s been working as a licensed auctioneer and real estate agent under L2 Realty Inc. for years, building a practice focused almost entirely on rural and agricultural properties. Most of his clients are landowners, farm families, and estates dealing with ground that’s been in the family for generations. That’s work he takes seriously.

What sets Alex apart isn’t just the auction format. It’s that he does his homework on every property before it ever hits the block. He knows the difference between dryland and irrigated ground, what buyers in a given county are actually willing to pay, and how to market a rural tract to people who will show up with real money on auction day.

He also works with other real estate agents across Kansas who have clients interested in selling at auction but don’t have the auctioneer license or event experience to run one. For those agents, Alex is the behind-the-scenes partner who handles the auction while they stay involved with their client.

  • Kansas Licensed Real Estate Auctioneer
  • Licensed Kansas REALTOR®
  • Brokered by L2 Realty Inc.
  • Additional license numbers and association details available on request
Request a Consultation View Services

Property review first

Alex starts with the property, the seller’s timeline, and whether auction is the best fit before recommending a strategy.

Marketing built for bidders

Photos, property details, buyer outreach, and auction terms are organized to reduce confusion and attract stronger participation.

Support through closing

From pre-auction planning through contract execution, Alex keeps the process moving and coordinates the next steps through L2 Realty Inc.

Backed by a Full Brokerage

Brokered by L2 Realty Inc.

Every transaction Alex handles is brokered through L2 Realty Inc., a licensed Kansas real estate brokerage. This means buyers and sellers benefit from the full legal and professional framework of a licensed brokerage — not just an independent auctioneer.

L2 Realty Inc. provides the brokerage structure, compliance oversight, and support systems that ensure every closing goes smoothly and every party is protected throughout the process.

L2 Realty Inc.
Licensed Kansas Real Estate Brokerage

Alex Miller Real Estate Auctions

Alex Miller is a licensed real estate auctioneer serving central Kansas. Every auction is handled with transparency, professionalism, and a commitment to getting sellers the best possible outcome.
